feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Assign reporting category in Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting
entry.content:
When I assign reporting category in Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity, this error occurs and can't assign.

I did not assign Country/Region when create report category and assign Country/Region in below screen. Because if i assign when create report category, this category does not appear to choose in below screen.

Kindly help me to solve this issue. Thank You.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: I am unable to print PO form.
entry.content:
We are using ME23N t-code to print PO form but unable to print po form it is asking for password when we try to click on print option. we can be able to save the po form but when we open saved pdf it is asking for password. We tried in ME9F also we got same issue. I can see the printing is not allowed in file permissions. How to provide access to print PO form.

Is there any option to enable printing permission from Basis or ABAP side?

entry.title: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content: Greetings, we are interested to learn what functionality now replaces scope item 19C which is no longer available in 2402. Can SAP please recommend the Best Practice alternative approach we should adopt to achieve similar functionality?

entry.title: Automatic supplier Validity date based on the supplier audit management on S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hello there!
How can S/4 Hana automate the validation of supplier validity dates based on supplier audit evaluation score?

I am looking for a descriptive solution with configurations. Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Pending quantities for services purchase order (without MIGO entering)
entry.content:
Hi All!

I am trying to understand why SAP (S/4 HANA 1909) is calculating pending quantities to services Purchase Orders (PO) in ME21N...

We use the DIEN material type to services here.

Is there any configuration to make on the system to avoid this calc?

entry.title: GST Picking Procedure in case of SEZ Vendors
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In our General Business Senoria Based on the condition types and Business place GST GLs are picking.

In case of SEZ Vendor should not flow as normal, it should take new GL (1234567).

And one more thing want to Know Whether Intra state and Interstate Transactions Only IGST GL should Pick?

Kindly Advise Us What Configuration is Required in case of SEZ Vendors for picking GST GL.

Regards

Chiranjeevi

entry.title: The system is not calculating ordinary depreciation automatically
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a problem with ordinary depreciation calculation,

can you see ordinary depreciation is not  calculated prior, Let me know how can i solve this issue?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Delta configurationfor Standard API in S/4 HANA cloud
entry.content:
In order to Create Delta for standard API:

Go to product master standard API in Business Accelerator Hub then click on tryout option.

 

Now, we have to configure our system environment here as shown below

 

 

 

 

 

And after successfully configuring Now you can tryout any of these operations in Standard API

 

Now in order to get delta, we have to take a delta pointer based on the fields in standard API. In this case I’m taking Lastchangedate field as delta pointer

 

And Filter out records based on delta pointer(Lastchangedate)as shown below

 

Here the logic is:   LastChangeDate ge datetime'2024-01-14T00:00:00’ And it says lastchangedate is greater than or equals to 2024-01-14 and also there are other logics as well: LastChangeDate ge datetime'2024-06-13T00:00:00' and LastChangeDate lt datetime'2024-06-14T00:00:00' and it only gives records between 14th june to 13th june .

So After initializing this logic run as shown below

 

we get records that are changed on or after 14th January 2024 in OData URL itself and it gives count of how many records are present as shown below

 

Now we can check data by taking URL till highlighted part and run OData in PowerBI

Now in Power BI, Select OData feed and add the required URL

And we can see required delta records here

entry.title: Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity in CBC
entry.content:
If we add new entry in Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity, that entity will appear in Run Statutory Reports app? 

I add text manually for Rep Entity and Reporting Entity Name. Is that also correct?

I referenced this blog.

Custom Reporting using Advance Compliance Report i... - SAP Community

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Material not valid for plant in Manage material coverage app
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently facing the problem that when I want to check one specific material in the App Manage Material coverage, it says that the Material is not valid for that plant. When I go into Stocks/ Req. List I can see it for that plant correctly tho. I tried checking any differences in material master for this problematic material vs other materials that show for that plant but I couldnt find any. 

The exact error message it gives is this: Plant DE02 is not valid for material 9000037. The system has therefore changed the plant to DE01.

I already checked AoR so its not because of that. Anybody faced a similar problem?

entry.title: S/4HANA technical replacement for FK01 BDC Create Vendor with reference
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we are currently in a transition to S/4Hana 2023 FPS1.
I need to convert some programs and run into a little tool that calls FK01 to create a new vendor in another company code based on the same vendor from another company code via bdc.

What I found in the SAP Note that this can be done with the Transaction "BP" and then  “Create from Reference” (2579816).
However, I'm searching for a more technical ABAP based approach to replace the old BDC call of FK01 ideally by keeping (nearly) the same parameters.
I checked BAPI’s and other possible interfaces, but could not found a cunning replacement (e.g. checked Note 2484299)

Does someone solve this problem already?
Many thanks in advance.

KR
Markus

entry.title: Support connection through Sap Router to Fiori
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I urgently need help configuring a connection from SAP Support through our SAP Router to a Fiori Launchpad.

Does anyone know how to set up this type of connection?

A connection to the application server is working fine, but I can't get a successfully connection for Fiori.

Thank you very much for your support.

entry.title: How to migrate G/L accounts to SAP S/4HANA in a greenfield implementation?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

My team is working on a greenfield S/4HANA implementation, since we're migrating from an SAP ECC to an SAP S/4HANA 2023 Cloud Private Edition. With this in mind, we'd like to know if:

  • Are there any tools or applications we could use to migrate our current G/L accounts to the new SAP S/4HANA system?

Thanks for your support!

Best regards,
Implementation team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: disaster recovery server
entry.content:
we are using sap s4 hana 2021 with hana databse with 110 gb ..

what are the perquisites to create a replication server which we can use/Switch  in Emergency situations?

Physical server config should be Same ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Capacity Planning CDS
entry.content:
Hi Expert

Any CDS view can take Available Capacity Time for each work Centers ? 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Authorization error in Run Statutory Reports app
entry.content:
When I run report in Run Statutory Reports app, authorization error occurs.

Please help me to solve this issue.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: How can I add an attachment at item level in the F2179 “Manage Scheduling Agreement” app?
entry.content:
How can I add an attachment at item level in the F2179 “Manage Scheduling Agreement” app when creating a delivery schedule, similar to ME31L?

Currently it seems to me that you can only add an attachment to the delivery schedule at header level in Fiori. Whereas in ME31L/ME32L you can also add an attachment at item level.

Can anyone help me with this? Or are there other ways of adding attachments to a scheduling agreement at item level?

Best regards,
Marco

entry.title: Hana database Restoration with full backup and differential/Incremental backup
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am looking for various ways of backup restoration on PERSON_NAME database through HANA studio as i came with scenario where i took differential backup before TR movement on Production, so if full + differential backup both needs to be restored upto specific time for data recovery or do i need take these backups in backup catalog to perform restoration. Kindly help with below restoration scenarios and how do we process.

  • Full + Differential backup restore
  • Full + Incremental backup restore
  • Full + Differential + Incremental restore

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: employee synchronization with existing business partner (/SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE)
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

we use HR module in s/4hana itself (no success factor or ECC or any third-party system) so  each of personnel is already maintained in PA30. (including 105 info type for user ID)
on the other hand, those personnel are already defined as BP with general and supplier roles.
so we did not have any experience with new model of employee and business users.
everything works fine, but now , there's requirement for "business user" in some workflows in Fiori. what things should be done?
even we activate /SHCM/EE_BP_1 business function. was that necessary? 
the configuration for T77S0 is done. when use "/SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE" to generate a new BP it works well.

but when we use that program to just make relationship between existing BP and employee with same code, the error raise that it is duplicated:

Business partner 467211 already exists - Synchronization failed.

in SLG1.

so the employee is there, with the same number BP already exist (with general and vendor role) , we just need to synchronize them to benefit from the concept of business user.

thanks.

entry.content:
Hi Folks

Facing this issue

 


Thanks, 

'Suggu Sandeep.
